intro: Skapanthus, also known as Star Anise or Illicium verum, is a flowering plant native to China and Southeast Asia, characterized by its distinctive star-shaped fruit and aromatic seeds. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to alleviate respiratory issues and boost the immune system.
